query_normalized: evaluating the use of graph neural networks for anomaly detection in network traffic computer science
rationale: This paper measures the dependent variable (anomaly detection performance) on the user's domain (network traffic/intrusion detection), satisfying acceptance criterion (b). It also studies the empirical population the question refers to (network traffic security), making it relevant related work for establishing the current baseline in this research area even though it uses CNN/K-means rather than GNNs.
